homepage_data_path.source: jobs.json loaded dynamically by client-side JavaScript at runtime
homepage_data_path.mechanism: index.html renders cards from jobs.json via inline JS (line 1434+). No static/embedded card data in HTML. No cached snippet files. Page URLs generated from page_url field in jobs.json.

hip_hop_caucus.action_taken: none needed — already correct in all active data files

edp_senior_data_scientist.jobs_json_snippet_after: The Senior Data Scientist will lead advanced analytics initiatives to support EDP's renewable energy operations and strategic decision-making. This role involves developing predictive models, analyzing large datasets, and providing actionable insights to improve energy efficiency and grid performance.
